member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.CrossFirebaseAuth.IsSupported
member.summary: Gets if the plugin is supported on the current platform.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.CrossFirebaseAuth.Current
member.summary: Current plugin implementation to use

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.CrossFirebaseAuth.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose of everything

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult
member.summary: A data class containing the ID token JWT string and other properties associated with the token including the decoded payload claims.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.GetClaim``1(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieves the claim casted to the generic type param.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.AuthDate
member.summary: Stores the ID token’s authentication date. This is the date the user was signed in and NOT the date the token was refreshed.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.Claims
member.summary: Stores the entire payload of claims found on the ID token. This includes the standard reserved claims as well as custom claims set by the developer via the Admin SDK.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.ExpirationDate
member.summary: Stores the ID token’s expiration date.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.IssuedAtDate
member.summary: Stores the date that the ID token was issued. This is the date last refreshed and NOT the last authentication date.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.SignInProvider
member.summary: Stores sign-in provider through which the token was obtained. This does not necessarily map to provider IDs.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.SignInSecondFactor
member.summary: Stores sign-in second factor through which the token was obtained.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IAuthTokenResult.Token
member.summary: Stores the JWT string of the ID token.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth
member.summary: Manages authentication for Firebase apps.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.VerifyPhoneNumberAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Starts the phone number authentication flow by sending a verification code to the specified phone number.
member.param: The phone number to be verified.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.CreateUserAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Tries to create a new user account with the given email address and password. If successful, it also signs the user in into the app.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SignInWithCustomTokenAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Asynchronously signs in to Firebase with the given Auth token.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SignInWithPhoneNumberVerificationCodeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Signs in using the verification code that was send to the given phone number after calling VerifyPhoneNumberAsync(phoneNumber).
member.param: The code that was send to the given phone number after calling VerifyPhoneNumberAsync(phoneNumber).

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SignInWithEmailAndPasswordAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Signs in using an email address and password.
member.param: If the user doesn't exist, it will be created automatically and signed in afterwards if the value is true.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SignInWithEmailLinkAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Signs in using an email address and email sign-in link.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SignInAnonymouslyAsync
member.summary: Asynchronously creates and becomes an anonymous user. If there is already an anonymous user signed in, that user will be returned instead. If there is any other existing user signed in, that user will be signed out.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.LinkWithPhoneNumberVerificationCodeAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Link the signed in user with a phone number.
member.param: The code that was send to the given phone number after calling VerifyPhoneNumberAsync(phoneNumber).

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.LinkWithEmailAndPasswordAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Link the signed in user with the given email address and password.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SendSignInLink(System.String,Plugin.Firebase.Auth.ActionCodeSettings)
member.summary: Sends a sign in with email link to provided email address.
member.param: The email address of the user.
An ActionCodeSettings object containing settings related to handling action codes.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SignOutAsync
member.summary: Signs out the current user.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.IsSignInWithEmailLink(System.String)
member.summary: Checks if link is an email sign-in link.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SendPasswordResetEmailAsync
member.summary: Sends authenticated user an email with a link to reset his password.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.SendPasswordResetEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Sends registered user an email with a link to reset his password.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.UseEmulator(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Modify this FirebaseAuth instance to communicate with the Firebase Authentication emulator. Note: this must be called before this instance has been used to do any operations.
member.param: The emulator host (for example, 10.0.2.2 on android and localhost on iOS)

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.AddAuthStateListener(System.Action{Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth})
member.summary: Registers a listener for authentication state changes.
member.returns: A token that detaches the listener when disposed.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseAuth.CurrentUser
member.summary: The currently signed in IFirebaseUser object or null if the user is signed out.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser
member.summary: Represents a user. Firebase Auth does not attempt to validate users when loading them from the keychain. Invalidated users (such as those whose passwords have been changed on another client) are automatically logged out when an auth-dependent operation is attempted or when the ID token is automatically refreshed.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.UpdateEmailAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the email address for the user. On success, the cached user profile data is updated. May fail if there is already an account with this email address that was created using email and password authentication.
member.param: The email address for the user.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.UpdatePasswordAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Updates the password for the user. On success, the cached user profile data is updated.
member.param: The new password for the user.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.UpdatePhoneNumberAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Updates the phone number for the user. On success, the cached user profile data is updated.
member.param: A valid verificationId retrieved by calling VerifyPhoneNumber().
The 6 digit SMS-code sent to the user.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.UpdateProfileAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Change the user’s profile data.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.SendEmailVerificationAsync(Plugin.Firebase.Auth.ActionCodeSettings)
member.summary: Initiates email verification for the user.
member.param: An ActionCodeSettings object containing settings related to handling action codes.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.UnlinkAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Disassociates a user account from a third-party identity provider with this user.
member.param: The provider ID of the provider to unlink.

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.DeleteAsync
member.summary: Deletes the user account (also signs out the user, if this was the current user).

member.name: M:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.GetIdTokenResultAsync(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Fetches a Firebase Auth ID Token for the user, which also contains custom claim information; useful when authenticating against your own backend.
member.param: Force refreshes the token. Should only be set to true if the token is invalidated out of band.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.Uid
member.summary: Returns a string used to uniquely identify your user in your Firebase project's user database.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.DisplayName
member.summary: Returns the main display name of this user from the Firebase project's user database.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.Email
member.summary: Returns the main email address of the user, as stored in the Firebase project's user database.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.PhotoUrl
member.summary: Returns the URL of this user's main profile picture, as stored in the Firebase project's user database.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.ProviderId
member.summary: Always returns FirebaseAuthProvider.PROVIDER_ID.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.IsEmailVerified
member.summary: Indicates the email address associated with this user has been verified.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.IsAnonymous
member.summary: Indicates the user represents an anonymous user.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.ProviderInfos
member.summary: Profile data for each identity provider, if any. This data is cached on sign-in and updated when linking or unlinking.

member.name: P:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.IFirebaseUser.Metadata
member.summary: Metadata associated with the Firebase user in question.

member.name: T:Plugin.Firebase.Auth.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
